title: cyclobothra pallida
intro: Cyclobothra pallida, also known as the Australian sandalwood, is a native plant to Western Australia that belongs to the Santalaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. It has been valued for its health benefits, such as reducing stress, promoting relaxation, and improving sleep quality. The herbal preparations of Cyclobothra pallida include essential oil, which is often used in aromatherapy, and powder, which can be consumed as a supplement or added to skincare products.
